formula: (support_services_dept_kpi_1 * 0.15 + support_services_dept_kpi_2 * 0.10 + support_services_dept_kpi_3 * 0.10 + support_services_dept_kpi_4 * 0.15 + support_services_dept_kpi_5 * 0.10 + support_services_dept_kpi_6 * 0.10 + support_services_dept_kpi_7 * 0.10 + support_services_dept_kpi_8 * 0.10) / 0.90
formula_description: Weighted average of department KPIs using each KPI's weight
